name: Cinnamon Apple Mince Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease 18 muffin cups or line with paper baking cups.
3. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients; stir until all ingredients are blended.
4. Spoon equal portions into prepared muffin cups.
5. Bake for 18 to 20 minutes or until lightly browned.
6. Cool for 1 minute.
7. Remove from muffin cups and top with Apple Cinnamon Glaze.
APPLE CINNAMON GLAZE: In a small bowl, mix 3/4 cup confectioners sugar, 1/8 tsp ground cinnamon, and 5 to 6 tbsp apple juice. Drizzle over warm muffins.
Hint: Use an ice cream scoop (or #20 food scoop) to fill muffin cups for even distribution. Makes life much easier.
